CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Continued To Aug-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG, and, ANGELINA DENG DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Marcus Brown, Esq. specially appearing for defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Defects cannot be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Second Amended Compalint
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG, ANGELINA DENG Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint. Appearances: Marcus Brown, Esq. specially appearing for defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike granted without leave to amend. Defects cannot be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Continued To Jul-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Continued To May-21-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG, and, ANGELINA DENG DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is continued to 5/21/2010 on the Court's own motion. Both parties must provide courtesy copies of their pleadings with cover letter regarding the new hearing date, per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Second Amended Compalint
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Continued To May-21-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG, and ANGELINA DENG Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is continued to 5/21/2010 on the Court's own motion. Both parties must provide courtesy copies of their pleadings with cover letter regarding the new hearing date, per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DAVID DENG, and, ANGELINA DENG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Leo Sanders, appearing in Pro Per; Brian H. Gunn, Esq. of Wolfe & Wyman LLP (925) 280-0004 appearing for Defendants and moving party. (This tentative ruling is not being contested.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. (Parties waive notice of today's ruling.) Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
